about.title: About Us
about.welcome: Welcome to Thakur Dental Clinic, where your smile is our top priority. Established in 2010, we have been serving the community with dedication and excellence in dental care.
about.mission: Our mission is to provide comprehensive dental services in a comfortable and hygienic environment. We believe in a patient-centric approach, ensuring that each individual receives personalized care tailored to their specific needs.
about.teamDescription: We are proud to have a team of highly skilled and experienced dentists who are experts in various fields of dentistry, including orthodontics, endodontics, periodontics, and cosmetic dentistry. Our support staff is friendly and always ready to assist you.
about.facilitiesDescription: Our clinic is equipped with state-of-the-art technology, including digital X-rays, intraoral cameras, and advanced sterilization systems. We adhere to strict infection control protocols to ensure the safety of our patients and staff.

landing.heroSubtitle: Experience world-class dental care with state-of-the-art technology and a team of dedicated professionals committed to your oral health.

expertDoctors.title: Expert Doctors
expertDoctors.description: Our team consists of highly qualified and experienced dental professionals.

modernTechnology.title: Modern Technology
modernTechnology.description: We use the latest dental equipment and technology for precise treatments.

comfortableEnvironment.title: Comfortable Environment
comfortableEnvironment.description: A relaxing and hygienic atmosphere to make your visit pleasant.
